## prompt-2-template-selection

*Generated by Process A from `Clinical-AI-Demos/.../ai-outputs/output-02/prompt.md` and the two candidate template directories, adapted for the single-prompt v4.0 build.*

Select exactly one LaTeX template file set to base the v4.0 bill and its twelve
LaTeX deliverables on: either `Clinical-AI-Demos/tree/main/ai-outputs/output-02`
(30 templates that share one skeleton per type and vary by title and color) or
`Clinical-AI-Demos/tree/main/ai-outputs/output-03` (30 templates where each of the
twelve legislative deliverables is a distinct document genre with its own cover,
body structure, and devices). Inspect each candidate's `README.md` and at least
one unzipped template, and justify the choice against this build's needs: the
twelve deliverables must each be converted to LaTeX with formatting appropriate to
its document type (Rule 2), and the whole bill must compile in Overleaf with no
images (Rule 5).

Map each of the twelve deliverables (`01`-`12` in
`cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill/deliverables`) to the chosen template's
matching genre, and record the per-genre devices (labeled blocks, numbered
findings, Ramseyer strike/insert, boxed operative sentence, fiscal table,
checklist and signature lines, register and phases, amendatory table, audit
matrix, testimony Q&A) that each deliverable appendix will use. Note that the
green ORCID logo image used by those templates is replaced here by a black text
ORCID hyperlink, because no images are permitted.

Output `auto-bill-01/02-template-selection/output-2-template-selection.md` plus a
directory `README.md` naming the upstream files used. Commit each file separately
and push in real time within a single pull request. Use only Claude Code Opus 4.8
(1M context) Max. Do not stall, ask questions, or go into plan mode.
